3069190.name: Primal Slideee
3069190.description:
➠ Showcase your skills through online multiplayer and ranking systems!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Does this game seem easy and simple to you?
Many people think this game is simple and boring.
But everyone changed their minds after playing the game.
This game is more fun and challenging than you might think.
It will require both your skill and luck.
I'm curious about your abilities.
Prove your skills through this game’s ranking system!
More vehicles, maps, and modes will be added in the future.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

★Controls - Only Mouse Left Button★
I won't go into detail. It's fun.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

FEEDBACK
We will actively accept your feedback and strive to upgrade the game.
Please feel free to talk about improvements.

*具有完全音频支持的语言
